allow: PowerShell($urls = 'http://localhost:3000/', 'http://localhost:3000/r/test-slug', 'http://localhost:3000/admin', 'http://localhost:3000/owner'; foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "{0,-40} {1}" -f $u, $r.StatusCode } catch { "{0,-40} ERROR {1}" -f $u, $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($urls = 'http://localhost:3000/', 'http://localhost:3000/r/test-slug', 'http://localhost:3000/admin', 'http://localhost:3000/owner'; foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "{0,-40} {1}" -f $u, $r.StatusCode } catch { "{0,-40} ERROR" -f $u } }; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/admin/dashboard' -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "{0,-40} {1} -> {2}" -f 'http://localhost:3000/admin/dashboard', $r.StatusCode, $r.Headers.Location)

PowerShell($urls = 'http://localhost:3000/owner', 'http://localhost:3000/owner/dashboard'; foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; "{0,-44} {1}" -f $u, $r.StatusCode } catch { $sc = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $loc = $_.Exception.Response.Headers.Location; "{0,-44} {1} -> {2}" -f $u, $sc, $loc } })

PowerShell($urls = @\( @{u='http://localhost:3000/'; expect=200}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/r/test-slug'; expect=200}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/admin'; expect=200}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/admin/dashboard'; expect=307}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/owner'; expect=200}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/owner/dashboard'; expect=307} \); foreach \($e in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $e.u -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; $sc = $r.StatusCode } catch { $sc = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; $ok = if \($sc -eq $e.expect\) {'OK '} else {'FAIL'}; "{0} {1,-44} got {2} expected {3}" -f $ok, $e.u, $sc, $e.expect })

PowerShell($urls = @\( @{u='http://localhost:3000/admin'; expect=200}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/admin/dashboard'; expect=307}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/admin/dashboard/menu'; expect=307}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/admin/dashboard/modes'; expect=307}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/admin/dashboard/design'; expect=307} \); foreach \($e in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $e.u -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; $sc = $r.StatusCode } catch { $sc = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; $ok = if \($sc -eq $e.expect\) {'OK '} else {'FAIL'}; "{0} {1,-50} got {2} expected {3}" -f $ok, $e.u, $sc, $e.expect })

PowerShell($urls = @\( @{u='http://localhost:3000/api/admin/state'; expect=401}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/admin/dashboard/modes'; expect=307}, @{u='http://localhost:3000/api/menu/origins'; expect=200} \); foreach \($e in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $e.u -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; $sc = $r.StatusCode } catch { $sc = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; $ok = if \($sc -eq $e.expect\) {'OK '} else {'FAIL'}; "{0} {1,-50} got {2} expected {3}" -f $ok, $e.u, $sc, $e.expect })
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { 'TYPECHECK OK' } else { 'TYPECHECK FAIL' })

PowerShell($slug = 'smoke-modes-1778408160484'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/r/$slug" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "ContentLength: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } else { 'page request failed' })
